name: QingHaiHuaDing Industrial CO.,LTD.
summary: QingHaiHuaDing Industrial CO.,LTD. manufactures and sells machinery. The company offers CNC heavy-duty horizontal lathe, roll lathe, railway special lathe, vertical horizontal machining center, and CNC milling products, as well as precision elevator parts, and food machinery and other products. It also provides gantry machining center, boring and milling center, inorganic glass magnesium composite air duct, color plate phenolic composite duct, and floor boring and milling center products. The company is based in Xining, China.
